title: Quiz night at Mujos for SPCA
description: GEORGE NEWS - Save the date for Thursday 19...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Save the date for Thursday 19 September at 19:00 and head to Mujos Restaurant for an exciting quiz night in support of the Garden Route SPCA. They need your help to raise much-needed funds, and your presence will make a huge difference.


> Donations of food, blankets, and other items are greatly appreciated, and every cent raised will go directly towards helping the animals in their care.


Reserve your spot today by calling or WhatsApp 072 562 2937. Entry is only R20, and every bit of it supports the SPCA.

Don’t miss out on a fantastic evening of trivia, plus the chance to win an amazing raffle prize!Let’s make it a night to remember, all while making a positive impact on the lives of animals in need.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
